package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_returns_framework_builder_to_upper_layer: Repositories that leak `*gorm.DB`, `sqlx.NamedStmt`, query builders, or raw rows to higher layers instead of returning results or domain abstractions.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule132NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule132NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule132NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario132Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule132NegativeService, input Rule132NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
